query_text: ski for advanced intermediate that's forgiving but not a beginner ski, 80-95mm waist, available in 170-175cm

results.explanation: Atomic Redster S9i strongly matches on: playfulness. Moderate match on: forgiveness. Review: "Turn initiation is very demanding — you need to commit fully" Review: "not forgiving at all if you get in the backseat" Review: "You feel every bump and ridge, which is exactly what you want in a race"

Head Easy Joy SLR strongly matches on: forgiveness. Weak match on: playfulness. Review: "very forgiving — even when I lean back they don't punish me" Review: "very forgiving" Review: "super soft flex"
Atomic Redster G9 strongly matches on: playfulness. Weak match on: forgiveness. Review: "Only for strong, aggressive skiers"
K2 Disruption 78C strongly matches on: forgiveness. Weak match on: playfulness. Review: "forgiving enough for my mistakes" Review: "Forgiving flex" Review: "Lightweight, not tiring"
Nordica Santa Ana 98 strongly matches on: forgiveness. Moderate match on: playfulness. Review: "Not as powerful but more maneuverable" Review: "Playfulness is moderate"

Fischer RC One 82 GT strongly matches on: playfulness. Moderate match on: forgiveness. Review: "Not a powder ski but handles light snow fine" Review: "Not as edgy as a pure carver but forgiving for intermediates to experts" Review: "Not tiring like a race ski but still performs at a high level."
Salomon Stance 90 strongly matches on: playfulness. Moderate match on: forgiveness. Review: "Not playful, very precise"

Rossignol Experience 78 Ca strongly matches on: forgiveness. Weak match on: playfulness. Review: "Very forgiving when I make mistakes." Review: "Soft enough to be forgiving but not floppy" Review: "Light enough that my legs don't get tired."
Moderate match on: playfulness. Weak match on: forgiveness. Review: "Not playful but very competent"
Moderate match on: forgiveness, playfulness. Review: "about 10% more forgiveness than a race ski" Review: "no versatility but pure carving" Review: "connected to the snow but protected from chatter"
